subject: [HOLMES] Fixed the Start-up Failure in the Dualstack Env
commit_message:
[HOLMES] Fixed the Start-up Failure in the Dualstack Env

Fixed the start-up failure in the dualstack and hence, updated the
docker image version.

Change-Id: Id0e98596016fe1fb772814b213792a1f6f5de439
Issue-ID: HOLMES-429
Signed-off-by: GuangrongFu <fu.guangrong@zte.com.cn>

Patch Set 4: -Code-Review

Hello,
I thing this merge needs cherry-pick form this commit from master https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/117395. This one actually moves HOLMES form cloudify to helm.

Both need do be in Honolulu.
I tried to cherry-pick it on my own but I think there are to many dependencies so we need your (@Sylvain and @ Krzysztof.O) master skills ;) 
Regards
Grzegorz

Patch Set 4: Code-Review+1

sorry. I missed that it's in Honolulu. Sorry

> Holmes HC are OK
> gate is not good due to SDNC issue (SDNC HC is FAIL so without surprise most of the tests are Fail)
> ASs far as I know Holmes HC are the only tests addressing Holmes

for "non core" components such as Holmes, we only merge patches that manages to have a gate with all hc tests but one successfull and all e2e tests but one (two with macro_mode for the moment) successful also.
as it's not the case, I've retriggered a gate
